rationale: P0 coverage is 100%, P1 coverage is 100% (target: 90%), and overall coverage is 100% (minimum: 80%). All 38 P0, 42 P1, 18 P2, and 8 P3 acceptance criteria have FULL coverage. No critical, high, medium, or low-priority gaps exist. The 11 skipped E2E tests are all environment-gated (require real external services or explicit CI tier opt-in), not broken — and their ACs are independently covered at unit/component/integration level.
